funcbody:
func TypeToString(v any) (string, bool) {
	switch s := v.(type) {
	case string:
		return s, true
	case template.HTML:
		return string(s), true
	case template.CSS:
		return string(s), true
	case template.HTMLAttr:
		return string(s), true
	case template.JS:
		return string(s), true
	case template.JSStr:
		return string(s), true
	case template.URL:
		return string(s), true
	case template.Srcset:
		return string(s), true
	}

	return "", false
}
